publishedAbstract: - Controlled ODF Upgrade to desired Z-stream version in a connected environment.- In standard connected environments, OLM automatically tracks the latest available version in the Red Hat catalog. Admins may require a controlled upgrade path to a specific Z-stream by "pinning" the catalog to a private registry snapshot while maintaining the standard subscription configuration.- Can I upgrade ODF to a specific z-stream version?
publishedTitle: How to upgrade ODF cluster to a specific z-stream version in a connected environment ?
